title: Attack Speed
attribution: Content from Liquipedia Dota 2 wiki (Attack Speed)
text:
Attack SpeedChangelogs
  
Attack Speed is the frequency with which units attack is measured. A unit's attack speed can be modified by items, per point of  agility, abilities providing flat bonuses and auras.

Contents

1 Mechanics
2 Base Attack Time

2.1 Examples
2.2 Benchmark
2.3 Exceptions
2.4 Other Units
2.5 Base Attack Time Manipulation

3 Base Attack Speed
4 Attack Speed Limits

4.1 Maximum Attack Speed

5 Fixed Attack Interval
6 Modifying Attack Speed

6.1 Bonuses
6.2 Items
6.3 Talents
6.4 Flat Reductions
6.5 Percentage Bonus
6.6 Percentage Reductions

7 Slow Resistance
8 Animations
9 Recent Changes

Mechanics[edit]
  IAS vs BAT: attacks per second
Most heroes have a base attack speed and base attack time of 100 and 1.7 respectively.
Total attack speed is defined as 
Σ Attack Speed = (Base Attack Speed + Σ  Current + Σ Flat Attack Speed Bonuses) × (1 + Attack Speed Multiplier)
with
20 ≤ Σ Attack Speed ≤ 700
Attack speed bonuses and reductions stack additively by a flat value and/or percentages. By default, the total attack speed value has a minimum of 20 and an maximum value of 700 and most unit's attack speeds cannot be reduced or increased beyond the values above.

The attack rate is the amount of attacks a unit can launch within a second, and is defined as 
r = (Σ Attack Speed) / (100 × BAT)
Therefore, the time needed per attack a hero launches is defined as
T = 1 / r

Base Attack Time[edit]
Every unit has a base attack time (BAT), which refers to the default interval between attacks for a unit without considering  agility and attack speed bonus. 
For example, a  Melee Creep has a BAT of 1, and thus attacks once per second by default. Similarly, if a hero with 1.7 BAT with no  agility and no bonus attack speed, they would attack once every 1.7 seconds. While nearly every unit can have their attack speed modified, only a few heroes can actively change their BAT.

Examples[edit]
With a base attack time of 1.7, 100 base attack speed and 20  agility at level 1. What is  Marci's current attack rate?
AttackRate = (100 + 20) / (100 x 1.7) = 0.706
Attack s^-1 = 1/r = 1.416
 Marci attacks about 0.706 times per second in this example, and takes 1.416 seconds between attacks.
Benchmark[edit]
Most heroes' attack rate is 0.588 attacks per second. Attack speed is expressed in percent of base attack speed. The base is therefore expressed as 100. Each point of increased attack speed (IAS) sources add 1 point to it, and attack speed works together with base attack time to determine how often a unit can attack.
When hovering over the hero's attributes in the HUD, the first field shows the attack speed and the time required per attack in parenthesis. The attack speed field is defaulted to 100 and adds the attack speed bonuses or reductions afterwards, with to a minimum of 20 and a maximum value of 700.

Base Attack Time Manipulation[edit]
There are a few abilities that can alter the base attack time of a unit, either by directly setting the unit's BAT to a fixed value or by reducing it by a certain amount.
Base attack time setting abilities do not stack with another and the first cast (or passively leveled) BAT setting ability has a higher precedence, even if another BAT setting ability with a lower BAT value gets used afterwards.
The only exceptions to this are  Metamorphosis and  Switch Discipline, which always override other BAT setting abilities once cast or passively acquired, the latter having the highest priority of all BAT setting abilities.
Meanwhile base attack time reducing abilities fully stack with each other (except for  False Promise and  Insatiable Hunger) and they also stack with the base attack time setting ability of the highest precedence. The order of stacking a BAT reducing and BAT setting ability does not matter, as BAT reducing abilities will always reduce a unit's current BAT after it was set to a fixed value by BAT setting abilities.

Base Attack Time Setting Sources
 Alchemist – Chemical Rage
 Lone Druid – Summon Spirit Bear
 Kez – Switch Discipline
 Lycan – Summon Wolves
 Snapfire – Lil' Shredder
 Terrorblade – Metamorphosis
 Troll Warlord – Battle Stance

Base Attack Time Reducing Sources
Crude Enchantment
Bonus Base Attack Time: -12%/-18%
Broodmother - Insatiable Hunger
Base Attack Time Reduction: 
Oracle - False Promise

Base Attack Speed[edit]
HeroAttack Speed859095100110115120125
Attack Speed Limits[edit]
Heroes with a unique base attack speed will also have a unique minimum attack speed equal to the difference between the hero's base attack speed and the default 100 base attack speed. 
For example,  Tiny has a base attack speed of 85, which is 15 less attack speed than the default 100. Therefore, his minimum attack speed will be 5, which is 15 less attack speed than the default 20 minimum attack speed.
This means despite  Tiny and  Drow Ranger both having the same 1.7 BAT, their slowest attack rates are 34 and 8.5  seconds respectively.  This works in reverse for higher base attack speeds —  Sven, whose base attack speed is 110, will have a minimum attack speed of 30.  
However, this minimum attack speed mechanic does not appear to apply to non-hero units. For example,  Roshan and  Hoodwink, who both have 2 BAT, both have a minimum attack rate of 10 seconds, despite Roshan having a base attack speed of 200.
The maximum attack speed of all heroes is 700. This value does not change based on the heroes' base attack speed. This means that heroes like  Tiny have a greater attack speed range (5 – 700) , and heroes like  Sven have a lesser attack speed range (30 – 700) than the average hero (20 – 700).

Maximum Attack Speed[edit]
The following abilities are able to change a unit's maximum attack speed (of 700), allowing it to reach even higher values. If a unit is affected by multiple abilities that change the maximum value, the higher value takes priority.

Maximum Attack Speed Changing Abilities
 Marci – Unleash
 Troll Warlord – Battle Trance3

Fixed Attack Interval[edit]
The following abilities perform instant attacks or attacks based on fixed intervals and they completely ignore the base attack time, attack speed and attack rate of the unit.

Abilities with Fixed Attack Intervals
Gyrocopter - Flak Cannon

Side Gunner Range: Side Gunner Interval: Prioritizes furthest unit away within its range.
Io - Tether

The attacks are performed as soon as the ally launches their attack (including instant attacks from the ally). It does not matter whether the attack actually hits or not.
Lifestealer - Infest

Enemy Hero Attack Interval: Enemy Hero Duration: Ability can be now cast on enemy heroes or creep-heroes.
Monkey King - Wukong's Command
Soldiers Attack Interval: 1.1
Puck - Dream Coil

Instant Attack Radius:  375Performs instant attacks on all leashed enemies, attack interval is set as casters attack rate at the time of cast or reset on coil break.
Riki - Tricks of the Trade
Radius: 425Attack Count: 4 ( )Instant Attack Interval: 0.667 ( -2)Max Channel Time: 2
Tiny - Tree Volley
Tree Throw Interval: Max Channel Time: 
Weaver - Geminate Attack
Instant Attack Interval: 0.25Number of Extra Attacks: 1 ( 2)

Modifying Attack Speed[edit]
These abilities increase or decrease a unit's attack speed by a constant value. These bonuses and reductions can not exceed the minimum and maximum attack speed limits.

Items[edit]
Many items grant their owners an attack speed bonus, increasing their attack speed when equipped, either by increasing their agility, or by just giving them a flat bonus.
The following items increase a unit's attack speed. The effects are limited to the item's owner, which must have the item equipped.

Percentage Bonus[edit]
Percentage attack speed changes can not exceed the minimum and maximum attack speed limits and are applied after flat attack speed bonuses and reductions.
Percentage attack speed changes stack additively with another.

Percentage Attack Speed Bonus Sources
Meepo - Divided We Stand (Codependent)
Attack Speed Bonus: The attack speed bonus is a percentage, applied to the total attack speed. Fully stacks with itself.

Percentage Reductions[edit]
Percentage Attack Speed Reduction Sources
Tiny - Grow
Total Attack Speed Factor: 0.65Reduces all sources of attack speed on  Tiny.
Giant's Maul - Crushing Blow
Attack Speed Slow: 15%The attack speed slow is a percentage, applied to the total attack speed.

Main Article: Hero Animations
Heroes with varying attack animations based on attack speed are tagged with AttackSpeedActivityModifiers in their hero attributes, and may have the following attack animations:

Recent Changes[edit]
Main Article: Attack Speed/Changelogs

VersionDescription

7.22(2019-05-24)

Heroes can now have non-standard initial attack speed values (previously 100 for all heroes).

7.21(2019-01-29)

 Agility heroes no longer gain 25% more main armor/attack speed/movement speed bonus per agility.

7.20(2018-11-19)

Increased maximum attack speed cap from 600 to 700.
